name: io.github.infiniteezverse/mcp-ezpath
description: Base DEX meta-router. Races 0x, ParaSwap, Aerodrome & Uniswap V3. Best quote. X402 pay-per-use.

environmentVariables.name: EZPATH_WALLET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key of a Base wallet holding USDC. Used to auto-sign EIP-3009 TransferWithAuthorization and pay 0.03 USDC per quote request. Example: 0xabc123...
